commentary_text: The model favors Canada at 40.5%, while sportsbooks favor Switzerland at 44.6%—a 16.5 percentage-point gap on the Switzerland win. The market is substantially more confident in a Swiss victory than the statistical forecast. This divergence could reflect recent lineup changes, injury news, or current form that the model has not incorporated since its last update. The dashboard surfaces this split as a signal worth monitoring; neither source claims certainty about which team will prevail.
